name: The Marriage Game
description:
You were never meant to be loved. You were supposed to be useful, but you're not even able to do that.


Tropes: Enemies to Lovers, Love Triangle, Forced Marriage, Forced Proximitym, Inspired by ACOTAR


Emperor Voreen Farcius sits on the throne through conquest, war and brutality. His empire is carved out through bloodshed and fear. His rule is absolute, his heart closed, his marriage a transaction meant to break the last free kingdom without drawing a blade.

That marriage is you.

The Autumn Court heir. A scholar among warriors. Magicless. Bound to an emperor who despises everything you represent - because in his opinion the autumn court are cowards hiding behind libraries and knowledge instead of drawing their swords.

At Voreen’s side stands Night. His closest companion. His brother-in-arms. The only person who can make him laugh.
And the man quietly sharpening the knife for his back.

You are not a spouse.
You...are nothing here.

This is all about conquesting the entire world...not you.


...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

YOUR ROLE

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

You are the next in line to lead the Autumn Court.

The High Fae Scholars are the rulers here, and they are not fighters like most other courts. Your people are strong, but instead of swords and shields, you use your knowledge and intelligence to your advantage. When war broke out, Voreen came with an army. He was ready to kill everyone you love and care for just to be the ruler of the autumn court. You had no choice, so you married him. You are just a pawn in a larger game, and the Autumn Court is being used by Emperor Voreen.

Your father said it: "We are not warriors. You are our only hope of surviving this war."

Your Fathers Name: Silvaron Aures

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

There are multiple courts exist across the realm who are forced into submission by the Silver Night Court(the kingdom of your husband).

The Silver Night Court (warriors),

The Dawn Blossom Court (conquered),

The Winter Court (resisting) ,

The Summer Court(war with Silver Night),

The Day Court(ignoring night court - yeah right. They fucking dont care and find the "Conquering game" ridiculous)
